expressions.name: depthwise_conv2d
expressions.formula: 设输入张量 X ∈ ℝ^{N×C×H_in×W_in}，其中 N=32, C=128, H_in=128, W_in=256。真实任务的 Model.__init__ 虽接收 out_channels 和 groups 参数，但实际构造为 nn.Conv2d(in_channels, in_channels, (3,7), stride=(1,1), padding=(0,0), dilation=(1,1), groups=in_channels, bias=False)，因此 out_channels=C=128 且 groups=C。权重 W ∈ ℝ^{C×1×K_h×K_w}，shape 为 (128,1,3,7)。输出 Y ∈ ℝ^{32×128×126×250}，其中 H_out=floor((128-1*(3-1)-1)/1+1)=126，W_out=floor((256-1*(7-1)-1)/1+1)=250。Depthwise 语义为：Y[n,c,ho,wo] = sum_{kh=0}^{2} sum_{kw=0}^{6} X[n,c,ho+kh,wo+kw] * W[c,0,kh,kw]。每个输出通道 c 只依赖同一个输入通道 c，不跨通道求和。
expressions.boundary_treatment: padding=0、stride=1、dilation=1，输出范围已保证 ho+kh ∈ [0,127] 且 wo+kw ∈ [0,255]。实现仍应对 tail output tile 做 mask，避免越界 store；若使用通用模板处理边界，X load mask 为 0<=hi<128 且 0<=wi<256。不要把 depthwise 权重当作 dense Conv2d 的 (C_out,C_in,Kh,Kw) 或 ConvTranspose 权重布局。

X.address_mapping: addr_X(n,c,hi,wi) = X_ptr + n*4194304 + c*32768 + hi*256 + wi

W.address_mapping: addr_W(c, 0, kh, kw) = W_ptr + c*21 + kh*7 + kw

Y.address_mapping: addr_Y(n,c,ho,wo) = Y_ptr + n*4032000 + c*31500 + ho*250 + wo

expressions.lowering_contract: This is depthwise Conv2d, not dense Conv2d. Do not use a dense K=C*Kh*Kw contraction over all input channels for each output channel. Lower by mapping output elements over (n,c,ho,wo) and reducing only Kh*Kw=21 values for the same c, or tile multiple spatial positions for the same channel. Weight layout is (C,1,Kh,Kw); output channels equal input channels. Because C=128 and spatial output is large, use output tiling and masks; avoid illegal memory access by bounding n,c,ho,wo and any generic hi/wi loads.
expressions.TDD_requirement: 用小尺寸对比，如 N=1, C=2, H_in=4, W_in=8, kernel=(3,3) 手动计算输出；验证真实输出 shape 为 (32,128,126,250)；与 PyTorch nn.Conv2d(in_channels, in_channels, (3,7), groups=in_channels, bias=False) 对比数值，确认每个通道只使用本通道输入和 W[c,0,:,:]。
